_comment: NativeRelay-Native built-in capability command codes — the single source of truth. EDIT THIS, then run gen.py. Your own business commands stay in your private project; these are generic system capabilities shipped by NativeRelay-Native.

commands.name: PickMedia
commands.desc: Pick image/video from the library; data = file path

commands.name: SaveToAlbum
commands.desc: Save a file to the photo album

commands.name: CapturePhoto
commands.desc: Capture a photo with the system camera; data = file path

commands.name: ScanCode
commands.desc: Scan a QR/barcode; data = scanned string
